description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Ubuntu 16.04 that runs on every pull request. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that runs in an ubuntu:16.04 container, checks out the repository with submodules, detects the Mull version, installs Python, pip, and Ansible, runs a CI task with ansible-playbook, and publishes a package to Bintray using curl and BINTRAY_API_KEY from secrets.
